column1: # Project: AI-Assisted Automotive Software Engineering Workflow
# Purpose: Sample IBM DOORS CSV export for requirements_agent testing

column2: The COM module shall transmit PDUs on the CAN bus within 10 milliseconds of the triggering event.
column7: OEM timing requirement derived from system requirement SYS-NET-042.

column2: The COM module shall handle bus-off recovery in an appropriate manner.
The DCM module shall support UDS service 0x22 (ReadDataByIdentifier) for all DIDs defined in the ODX file.
The DCM module shall respond to diagnostic requests fast.
The AUTOSAR OS shall schedule OsTask_10ms with a period of 10 milliseconds and priority 5.
The AUTOSAR OS shall provide sufficient stack memory for all tasks.
column7: TBD - stack sizes to be confirmed after integration.

column2: The NVM module shall persist all calibration data across ECU power cycles.
The NVM module shall be easy to configure and maintain.
The MCAL SPI driver shall support a clock frequency of 1 MHz for communication with the external EEPROM.
column7: Hardware interface requirement from HW team drawing HW-SPI-007.

column2: The COM module shall support flexible and efficient PDU routing between CAN and LIN networks.
